name: Software Engineer
description: Designs, writes, and debugs software applications and system utilities.

name: Data Scientist
description: Analyzes complex datasets using mathematics, statistics, and machine learning models to extract business intelligence.

name: Cloud Engineer
description: Architects, maintains, and secures remote database servers and enterprise cloud networks.

name: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects company networks and user data from security breaches, hacking attempts, and malware.

name: AI Engineer
description: Builds and trains artificial intelligence neural network models, chat systems, and computer vision systems.

name: Doctor / Medical Practitioner
description: Diagnoses, treats, and supports patients, restoring health and preventing illnesses.

name: Lawyer / Legal Counselor
description: Advises clients on legal rights, drafts contracts, and represents individuals or groups in legal courts.

name: Teacher / Educator
description: Plans schedules, guides lessons, and simplifies complex concepts to support student development.

name: Psychologist
description: Studies human behaviors, emotions, and thoughts to counsel individuals and support mental well-being.

name: Architect
description: Plans, visualizes, and drafts structural designs for buildings and aesthetic functional spaces.

name: Chartered Accountant
description: Audits corporate accounting statements, manages tax filing calculations, and monitors compliance regulations.

name: Financial Analyst
description: Analyzes market rates, performs investment risk checks, and updates asset spreadsheets.

name: Investment Banker
description: Helps clients raise capital through corporate financing and provides strategic merger recommendations.

name: Business Analyst
description: Bridges corporate gaps by analyzing metrics to suggest efficiency steps to management.

name: Entrepreneur / Start-up Founder
description: Launches business startups, directs core strategy, raises funds, and directs operations.

name: UX/UI Designer
description: Maps client requirements to draft visual interfaces, app wireframes, and user research models.

name: Graphic Designer
description: Creates visual assets, logos, and promotional sketches for marketing campaigns and publications.

name: Mechanical Engineer
description: Builds and runs mechanical apparatuses, vehicle models, engine tools, and gears.

name: Civil Engineer
description: Directs public sector infrastructure construction, including bridge foundations, highway maps, and structural safety grids.

name: Digital Marketer
description: Manages brand social networks, targets advertising, and tracks campaign metric percentages.
